system.description:
Prerequisite: Liaison or Streetwise skill

The character knows how to get the best deals for goods and services. Any item the character purchases costs only 90% of its list price, and any item the character sells goes for 110% of its base price. If both the seller and the buyer have this Trait, make an opposed Liaison/SOC or Streetwise/INT (as appropriate) throw to determine who gets the bonus.
